'''âp-z-m-j''' ('''kapazmejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vocalise|vocalise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-z-m-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vocalise|vocalise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-z-m-j
|-
! Lemma
| kapazmejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipazmejoko|thipazmejoko]] || [[word:jipazmejoko|jipazmejoko]] || [[word:shipazmejoko|shipazmejoko]] || [[word:kipazmejoko|kipazmejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupazmejoko|thuthupazmejoko]] || [[word:jujupazmejoko|jujupazmejoko]] || [[word:shushupazmejoko|shushupazmejoko]] || [[word:kukupazmejoko|kukupazmejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopazmejoko|thopazmejoko]] || [[word:jopazmejoko|jopazmejoko]] || [[word:shopazmejoko|shopazmejoko]] || [[word:kopazmejoko|kopazmejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpazmejoko|thĂŠpazmejoko]] || [[word:jĂŠpazmejoko|jĂŠpazmejoko]] || [[word:shĂŠpazmejoko|shĂŠpazmejoko]] || [[word:kĂŠpazmejoko|kĂŠpazmejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapazmejoko|thathapazmejoko]] || [[word:jajapazmejoko|jajapazmejoko]] || [[word:shashapazmejoko|shashapazmejoko]] || [[word:kakapazmejoko|kakapazmejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapazmejoko|thapazmejoko]] || [[word:japazmejoko|japazmejoko]] || [[word:shapazmejoko|shapazmejoko]] || [[word:kapazmejoko|kapazmejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapazmejoko|thapazmejoko]] || [[word:japazmejoko|japazmejoko]] || [[word:shapazmejoko|shapazmejoko]] || [[word:kapazmejoko|kapazmejoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shapazmejithi|shapazmejithi]] || [[word:shapazmejiji|shapazmejiji]] || [[word:shapazmejishi|shapazmejishi]] || [[word:shapazmejiki|shapazmejiki]]
